rationale: Google Sign-In is the only way to set up the primary account in a consumer app; no Sign in with Apple, no equivalent privacy-focused login option, and none of 4.8's exemptions apply.
notes: Control twin for check16-eid-login-exempt: a clear-cut 4.8 violation under both the old and the current wording, so grounded and ungrounded runs should agree here — guards against grounding causing false passes on the same check.
